title: MODTWIN Material
author: Nast, Benjamin
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This repository contains the material to implement three example case studies using the MODTWIN modeling method: 
 
 .csv file for the metadata 
 .csv file for the import of the classes 
 .png files for representing the classes in the MODTWIN tool 
 Excerpt of historical sensor data to realize the DT 
 
 (Coming soon: MODTWIN manual) 
  MODTWIN: Modeling Digital Twins  
 The MODTWIN modeling method enbables the development of digital twins (DTs) considering the specific organizational requirements of small and medium-sized enterprises (SMEs). The method components include guidelines, steps, and the necessary methods for application. 
 The MODTWIN modeling tool supports the entire development process without requiring any special IT knowledge at the application level. This is intended to help (i) incorporate the required domain knowledge, (ii) support the construction of DT models, and (iii) create the actual DT with its functionalities.
